channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT Releases This Week in the UAE
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in the UAE — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: Cape Fear — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 7.1 · Worth a watch — When convicted murderer Max Cady is released from prison, he begins infiltrating the family of the married attorneys who helped put him behind bars.

item.title: Lucky — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 6.4 · Decent one-time watch — When a multi-million-dollar heist goes sideways, con artist Lucky is forced to go on the run. Pursued by both the FBI and a ruthless crime boss, Lucky must…

item.title: Descendants: Wicked Wonderland — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.6 · Must watch — Now that the Queen of Hearts is nice and Cinderella is safe, things seem perfect for Red and Chloe… But little do they know that changing the past created a…

item.title: The Odyssey — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.7 · Must watch — Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.

item.title: Lingam — STARZPLAY
item.description: STARZPLAY · Tamil · Not enough ratings yet — Framed for a crime he didn't commit, a kabaddi hero gets pushed into a world he never wanted and ultimately becomes a feared name.

item.title: Agent Kim Reactivated — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Korean · ★ 7.6 · Must watch — When an unassuming dad's daughter goes missing, he dusts off his old black-ops skills to track her down — only to attract the wrong kind of attention.

item.title: Oru Vadakkan Velicham - A Northern Light — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Malayalam · Not enough ratings yet — When a young man is taken in for questioning about the disappearance of a woman, a seemingly routine interrogation slowly unravels into something far more…

item.title: Dhamaal 4 — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Hindi · Not enough ratings yet — The Dhamaal boys are back for another treasure hunt, facing hilarious challenges in their quest for the Treasure of Life.

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Alpha — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Hindi · Not enough ratings yet — When Sita, a highly trained assassin raised in isolation as a super-soldier by a rogue commander, discovers the dark truth about her family and her stolen…

item.title: Super Subbu — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Telugu · Not enough ratings yet — An unlucky teacher is assigned to teach sex ed in a hostile village. Can he balance this secret while chasing his dreams and saving his relationship?

item.title: Silo — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: Isakapatnam — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · Telugu · Not enough ratings yet — Set in the 1990s, in the ruthless port town of Isakapatnam, three forces collide—a woman driven by justice, a henchman torn by loyalty, and a common man hungry…

item.title: Alliance — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · Hindi · Not enough ratings yet — A competitive captive reality show blending high-stakes strategy, economy and psychological warfare.

item.title: Minions & Monsters — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.4 · Decent one-time watch — This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters…

item.title: House of the Dragon — OSN+
item.description: OSN+ · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: The Furious — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Chinese · ★ 7.4 · Worth a watch — After a criminal network kidnaps Wang Wei's daughter and the corrupt police refuse to assist him, Wei sets out on his own to locate her.
